title: Propulsion and Steering Systems Maintenance
paragraphs: We service and overhaul propulsion and steering equipment including bow and stern thrusters, propellers, rudders, and steering gear assemblies. All work is carried out in accordance with class requirements, manufacturer specifications, and approved procedures.
From inspections and alignments to full component replacement, we ensure your vessel’s maneuverability systems operate safely and efficiently before departure.

title: Hydraulic and Mechanical Power Systems
paragraphs: Our team maintains and repairs hydraulic cylinders, pumps, motors, and gearboxes used across deck and engine room systems. We provide fault diagnosis, seal replacement, pressure testing, and complete system overhauls when required.
By restoring performance and eliminating leaks or inefficiencies, we help operators avoid unplanned downtime and maintain reliable onboard power transmission.

title: Deck Machinery and Cargo Handling Equipment
paragraphs: We maintain and overhaul deck equipment such as anchor and mooring winches, windlasses, cranes, and other cargo handling machinery. Our work includes mechanical repairs, hydraulic servicing, load testing, and operational checks.
Whether during dry-dock or afloat, we ensure all deck machinery meets safety standards and performs reliably during demanding port and offshore operations.

title: Engine Room Machinery and Auxiliary Systems
paragraphs: We provide inspection, maintenance, and overhaul of main engines, auxiliary generators, pumps, compressors, heat exchangers, boilers, and valves. Our technicians follow OEM procedures and class guidelines to ensure full compliance and traceability.
From routine servicing to complete machinery rebuilds, we support shipowners with planned maintenance that improves efficiency, extends equipment life, and reduces the risk of in-service failures.
